message.content: {"analysis":"Training has been running for a very long time with no output at all. This is suspicious - even the first 'Train a' message should have appeared. The process might be stuck or the output is not being displayed. Let me check if the process is actually running and making progress.","plan":"Check if the Python process is running and check for any new files that might indicate progress.","commands":[{"keystrokes":"ls -la /proc/$(cat /tmp/pid 2>/dev/null || echo 1)/status 2>/dev/null; date; ls -lht /app/*.bin | head -5\n","duration":2.0}]}
